{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/132698271?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/khoaln98", "id": 132698271, "login": "khoaln98", "node_id": "U_kgDOB-jQnw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/khoaln98", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-34151", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-24", "name": "Path Traversal: '../filedir'"}], "description": "### Impact

With Jetty 12+ a user can craft a URL to access any resource the Jetty instance is allowed to access.

For example `http://[host]/xwiki/bin/skin/..%252f/..%252f..%252f..%252f..%252f..%252f..%252f..%252fetc/passwd` allows downloading the content of the /etc/passwd file, provided Jetty is allowed to read it, and if your XWiki webapp is located exactly 5 levels below `/` (like `/var/lib/jetty/webapps/xwiki`, which is the case in the docker image, for example).

Another example which does not go out of the XWiki webapp, but it's still a vulnerability (since users should not be allowed to access Hibernate or XWiki configuration files) is `http://[host]/xwiki/bin/skin/..%252f/..%252fWEB-INF/xwiki.cfg`.

### Patches

This vulnerability has been patched in XWiki 17.10.5 and 18.2.0.

### Workarounds

A possible workaround is to use a different application server, like Jetty < 12 (in the case of XWiki < 17) or Tomcat, which don't seem to be impacted.

### Resources

* https://jira.xwiki.org/browse/XWIKI-24075
* https://jira.xwiki.org/browse/XCOMMONS-3594

### For more information

If there are any questions or comments about this advisory:
* Open an issue in [Jira XWiki.org](https://jira.xwiki.org/)
* Send an email to the [Security Mailing List](mailto:security@xwiki.org)

### Attribution

 Lê Ngọc Khoa reported the vulnerability.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qj4x-9g63-25g6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-07T13:01:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qj4x-9g63-25g6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qj4x-9g63-25g6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-34151"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-07T13:01:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform/security/advisories/GHSA-qj4x-9g63-25g6", "https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-commons/pull/1675", "https://jira.xwiki.org/browse/XCOMMONS-3594", "https://jira.xwiki.org/browse/XWIKI-24075", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qj4x-9g63-25g6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/xwiki/xwiki-platform/security-advisories/GHSA-qj4x-9g63-25g6", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/xwiki/xwiki-platform", "summary": "XWiki Platform Old Core: Resource path traversal via /skin/ action endpoint in Jetty 12+", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T13:01:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qj4x-9g63-25g6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "17.10.5", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.xwiki.platform:xwiki-platform-oldcore"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 17.10.5"}, {"first_patched_version": "18.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.xwiki.platform:xwiki-platform-oldcore"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 18.0.0-rc-1, < 18.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: XWiki Platform Old Core: Resource path traversal via /skin/ action endpoint in Jetty 12+
